dinoex      2006-09-28 19:17:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/paje         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    science/paje/files   patch-DrawView+Drawing.m 
  Log:
  Paje is a graphical tool that displays traces produced during the
  execution of multithreaded programs. Other programs can also generate
  traces for this tool.
  PR:             103677
  Submitted by:   Gürkan Sengün
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
